title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! ☆ You won so many plushies! You
could bury me under them, and nobody would
even know I was there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea you were so good at crane games!
You just kept dropping plushies into the prize slot
one after another!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You have the awesomest, buono-est winning
moves ever! ♪
